---
title: "Classifier-free Guidance"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.method-page}
# Classifier-free Guidance

Condition dropout trains the model to predict both with and without the conditioning. At inference:

$$
v_{guided}=v_\emptyset + w\left(v_c-v_\emptyset\right).
$$

The scale \(w\) controls how strongly the FM trajectory follows the CNO/LR conditioning. In OceanLens this was tested
to fight under-dispersive residuals and increase generated contrast.

Reference: [Classifier-Free Diffusion Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.12598).
:::
